page_content:
Advanced Level/Advanced Subsidiary Level (A-Level/AS-Level)

The University of Maryland awards credit for A-Level/AS-Level exams taken through Cambridge International Exams (CIE) or other approved boards. Credit is not awarded for all exams offered and is based on departmental approval. Students are not permitted to earn credit for both A-Level and AS-Level exams within the same subject areas. Official scores must be sent by CIE or the approved exam board to UMD.

official score reports to be sent to UMD. The Score Recipient Code is 5814.
